'''Darth Maladi's laboratory''' was a room inside the former [[Temple of the Sith|Jedi Temple]]. After the Sith confiscated the structure, [[Darth Maladi]] took up residence in the area formerly used as the Jedi's [[Halls of Healing|infirmary]]. The main room used for operations was transformed into the [[Torture/Legends|torture]] chamber while the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] tanks glowed red in a darkened room.

In [[137 ABY]], Maladi tortured [[Hosk Trey'lis]] in this [[Laboratory/Legends|room]] with [[PI-series medical assistant droid]]s to find out information on [[Cade Skywalker]].

The lab was later used by Maladi for the torture of Cade Skywalker, in which Maladi injected his body with lethal amounts of [[Ixetal cilona/Legends|ixetal cilona]].
